# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from '@vercel/node';

export default async (req: VercelRequest, res: VercelResponse): Promise<void> => {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return res.status(405).end('Method Not Allowed');
  }
  
  const { contentText, headers } = req.body;

  if (!contentText) {
    return res.status(400).end('Invalid request body');
  }

  const reader = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      controller.enqueue(contentText);
      controller.close();
    }
  }).getReader();

  const decoder = new TextDecoder('utf-8');
  
  let chunk;
  const chunks = [];
  while (!(chunk = await reader.read()).done) {
    chunks.push(decoder.decode(chunk.value || new Uint8Array(), { stream: !chunk.done }));
  }

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(headers || {})) {
    res.setHeader(key, value);
  }

  res.status(200).end(chunks.join(''));
};
